docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GROTBECK, CHRISTOPHER LEE

REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 20, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ALYSIA TRAN RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
